_comment: SAMPLE / SEED DATA — a stylized neon GLOBE (sphere map) bundled so the 3D dynamic-maps feature is demonstrably functional OFFLINE on first launch. The owner REPLACES all of this over the content repo; nothing here is authoritative lore. Coordinates are [lon, lat] in DEGREES (GeoJSON order). Edges are great-circle arcs, densified by the app for rendering + hit-testing. Pole-covering zones use `sphericalCap` (angular distance), never a polygon. NO texture asset is shipped — the globe is rendered stylized (radial-shaded neon), so `sphere.textureAsset` names a kind that simply is not present. See AUDIT-V2 §4.5 (Plan A) / §4.7.

theme._comment: Dark-only, on-brand green/teal palette. Survives MapTheme.sanitize() unchanged (§4.6).
theme.label: #EAFFF6

fields.brief: Slag foundries ring the western terminator. The Pact smelts hull-ore here around the clock.
Ochre dust-storms scour the equatorial plate. Nomad convoys read the wind for safe passage.
Mag-rail yards stretch to the eastern limb. Contested with the Rustwinds every dry season.
A sunken southern caldera, permanently in shadow. Neither faction claims the cold.
The polar ice-glass fields. A free port sits at the exact pole, beholden to no one.
